articles.title: SOC 2
articles.summary: Delve officially launched Computer Use Agents that allow founders and GRC teams to go auto-capture all screenshots for SOC 2.

articles.title: OPENAI GPT-4.1
articles.summary: OpenAI has launched three new models in its API: GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and GPT‑4.1 nano. These models outperform GPT‑4o and GPT‑4o mini across the board, with major gains in coding and instruction following. They also have larger context windows—supporting up to 1 million tokens of context—and are able to better use that context with improved long-context comprehension. They feature a refreshed knowledge cutoff of June 2024.

articles.title: HUGGING FACE ACQUIRES POLLEN ROBOTICS
articles.summary: Hugging Face, the center of the open source AI community, has long stated its goal is to be a decentralized DeepMind. While this isn't exactly the case, adding in an open source robotics platform via Pollen moves it closer to that goal.

articles.title: DOLPHINGEMMA
articles.summary: DeepMind has announced DolphinGemma, a large language model developed by Google that helps scientists study how dolphins communicate — and hopefully find out what they're saying, too.

articles.title: SEAWEED-7B: COST-EFFECTIVE TRAINING OF VIDEO GENERATION FOUNDATION MODEL
articles.summary: The ByteDance team has released a paper showing how to train a competitive 7B parameter video generation model on a “modest” compute budget of 655k H100 hours. It has strong performance on a number of temporally difficult tasks.

articles.title: PIXELFLOW: PIXEL-SPACE GENERATIVE MODELS WITH FLOW
articles.summary: Most generative models on continuous signals operate in latent space due to computational constraints. This work introduces a series of cascades that allow the generation to happen directly in pixel space. This eliminates the need for a pretrained VAE.

articles.title: INTERACTVLM: 3D INTERACTION REASONING FROM 2D FOUNDATIONAL MODELS
articles.summary: New VLM that can reason about contacts between humans in 3D and objects. It does so by leveraging a strong base model and lifting its reasoning into 3D with clever multi-view rendering.

articles.title: 3B PARAMETER TOKENIZER
articles.summary: Scaling up image tokenizers is challenging because they tend to collapse. This work introduces GigaTok, which is a massive tokenizer with superior reconstruction performance. Decoder scaling and regularization helped with stability and overall quality.

articles.title: IMPROVED MOE WITH C3PO
articles.summary: C3PO introduces a new test-time optimization technique that improves accuracy in Mixture-of-Experts LLMs by re-mixing expert weights based on similar reference samples.

articles.title: VISUAL REASONING WITH LESS DATA
articles.summary: Using MCTS to quantify sample difficulty, ThinkLite-VL improves reasoning in VLMs with just 11k training samples and no distillation.

articles.title: BROWSECOMP BENCHMARK FOR HARD-TO-FIND KNOWLEDGE
articles.summary: OpenAI's BrowseComp is a new benchmark of 1,266 problems designed to evaluate AI agents' browsing skills in gathering complex, hard-to-locate information online.

articles.title: BUSINESS LEADERS' THOUGHTS ON AI POSSIBILITIES
articles.summary: Executives from nine companies share how they're leveraging Google Cloud's AI tools to drive innovation across sectors, with over 600 real-world use cases highlighted.

articles.title: 6 HIGHLIGHTS FROM GOOGLE CLOUD NEXT 25
articles.summary: Vertex AI introduces updates to video, image, speech, and music generation models, enhancing creative workflows for businesses. Google AI is enabling specialized AI agents for companies, improving productivity and security. A new Agent2Agent Protocol allows different AI agents to securely communicate across platforms.

articles.title: DEEPSEEK TO OPEN SOURCE ITS INFERENCE ENGINE
articles.summary: DeepSeek's inference engine is built on VLLM, although it is now heavily modified.

articles.title: NVIDIA TO MANUFACTURE AI SUPERCOMPUTERS IN THE U.S.
articles.summary: NVIDIA is localizing AI hardware production by building factories in Texas and Arizona, aiming to produce Blackwell chips and AI supercomputers entirely within the U.S.

articles.title: GEMINI ADDS QUESTION GENERATION TO GOOGLE CLASSROOM
articles.summary: Educators can now use Gemini to generate questions or quizzes from selected text in Google Classroom, enhancing lesson interactivity and streamlining content creation.
